Landed in ae8ac93. Added phux_core::Registry::sessions() iterator (yielding (SessionId, &Session) pairs) and phux-server id_bridge::IdBridge struct (phux_core::SessionId <-> phux_protocol::SessionId, monotonic wire-id allocation from 1, idempotent intern, reverse resolve, retired ids not recycled). Removed seeded_sessions ledger workaround in ServerState. 73 tests pass (phux-core + phux-server); cargo fmt/clippy/deny clean; diff_spike unchanged.

Landed in fa335e1. Added FrameKind variants Attach/Detach/InputKey/InputMouse/InputFocus/InputPaste (C->S) and Attached/Detached/Bell (S->C) per SPEC §7.1-§7.5 + §9.1-§9.4. Encoders/decoders mirror PaneDiff pattern, 13 insta snapshots + 7 proptest round-trips. Non-obvious decisions for byc.6: (1) AttachRole {Primary=0, Viewer=1} is phux-defined (not in SPEC §13) -- minimum useful split. (2) PaneSnapshot {cols, rows, ops: Vec<DiffOp>} is minimum per SPEC §8.4 -- cursor/modes/scrollback are TODO. (3) Detached carries no body this wave (SPEC §7.3 {reason, message} deferred). (4) FrameKind dropped Eq (now PartialEq only) because MouseEvent has f64. (5) Added DecodeError::UnknownEnumValue {field, value} for libghostty atom round-trip safety. NOT touched: phux-core, phux-server (per task scope), no From<phux_core::ids::SessionId>. Deferred: OscEvent §7.7, Alert §7.8, InputRaw §9.5. All quality gates green: fmt, clippy -D warnings, nextest (67 protocol + 204 workspace), diff_spike, cargo deny.

Landed in 5c5c1d6. Cell::text now stack-allocates for grapheme clusters of length <= 2 (covers empty cells, ASCII, and base+single-combining — the common case). Wire format unchanged; verified via diff_spike byte-identical output (md5 004fe6c4a8f2ad4e61ee8054fb459fbd). smallvec gated behind the protocol's `server` feature, so the publish-clean default build is unaffected.

Substrate landed in cc30ab5. ColorSupport enum + downsample_color + per-client color_support on AttachedClient + phux-server::downsample helper module + comprehensive tests (unit + proptest). diff_spike byte-identical. Follow-ups: phux-7lf (HELLO wiring), phux-i02 (CIELAB), phux-982 (Cow signature).

Landed in fd89d93dc712c4d46aee8f5066ffaa846f59e7d8. CursorState + PaneModes + base_frame_id + revision fields added to PaneDiff per SPEC §8.5; op-stream cursor ops deleted. New diff_spike md5: b84a5890eda2277734faad33b7411c74. Follow-up phux-bxa filed for MouseProtocol/MouseEncoding enums.
duplicate of phux-byc.6.1 (race condition during follow-up filing)

Landed in b237eba. Code: 4-module attach module (connection.rs/driver.rs/input.rs/render.rs ~1400 LOC + tests) + phux attach <session> CLI subcommand. just ci green (workspace nextest 278 passing, +18 new tests in phux-client). Manual two-terminal smoke test deferred until phux-byc.8 (server ATTACH handler) lands — handle_client only handles PING today. Three follow-ups filed: phux-4hp (VIEWPORT_RESIZE wire frame + SIGWINCH wiring), phux-631 (configurable detach key), phux-19e (smarter VT input parser).

Wave A complete in commit c0ef4ec. Workspace-wide rename PaneId→TerminalId + PANE_*→TERMINAL_* frames green: 57 files, +994/-947, just ci passes (fmt+clippy+nextest 347/347+deny). Wire bytes unchanged. TUI/CLI 'pane' vocabulary preserved per ADR-0016. Borderline L3 layout-tree API names (Window::panes, Window::active, LayoutNode::Leaf, etc.) intentionally preserved for Wave C.

Wave C complete in commit 7b7f976. SPEC.md restructured by L1/L2/L3 tiers per ADR-0015/0016/0017. WindowId/LAYOUT_CHANGED/FOCUS_CHANGED/WINDOW_*/LayoutNode demoted to non-normative SPEC §17 (TUI consumer conventions, L3 metadata-backed). CC_FRONTEND reclaimed; PaneNotFound→TerminalNotFound (numeric 104 preserved). 'layers' bitset added inside ClientCapabilities/ServerCapabilities via Appendix-A field-id extensibility (wire bytes unchanged). New error codes: COLLECTION_NOT_FOUND, METADATA_KEY_NOT_FOUND, OUT_OF_TIER, UNSUPPORTED_SATELLITE_ROUTE. just check + rustdoc -D warnings green.

Wave D complete in commit 31a804f (was 1568070 in worktree). Update notes on ADR-0004/0006/0007/0008/0010/0012/0014. ADR-0010: tmux CC reservation overturned by ADR-0017 (CC_FRONTEND reclaimed). ADR-0007: federation tag generalized from SessionId to all identities per ADR-0015. ADR-0014 (server-terminal-pane-actor): PaneActor→TerminalActor noted. ADR-0018 verified clean (already uses TerminalId post-2026-05-26 addendum). just check + rustdoc -D warnings green.
Subsumed by Wave D (phux-vp0.3, commit 31a804f). The ADR cleanup pass landed as part of the L1 vocabulary cascade.

Already implemented as of today's wave-1 work. runtime.rs uses spawn_local + LocalSet at every per-client/per-terminal spawn site (lines 241, 395, 530, 595, 991, 1475 — including the per-client JoinSet at line 530 via JoinSet::spawn_local and the attach orchestration at 991). TerminalActor (!Send libghostty Terminal owner) is co-located on the LocalSet. The three remaining 'tokio::spawn' string hits in phux-server are doc comments explaining the spawn_local choice. ADR-0014 records the decision. No code change needed.
Shipped via PR #3; see ADR-0018 addendum.

Shipped via PR #4: https://github.com/phall1/phux/pull/4. Note: dep on phux-l0t kept since the dirty()-reliability invariant still matters for the tick driver (phux-q0e.3) — this ticket only delivered the synthesizer extension. Force-closing because code is shipped.

Diagnosed via PR #5: Outcome B (upstream FFI bug in libghostty-vt rev 31d1f70 at Snapshot::set — passes *const *const T to C instead of *const T). Calling Snapshot::set_dirty(_) poisons the next update's dirty() read with InvalidValue, value-agnostic. Diagnostic test in crates/phux-server/tests/phux_l0t_dirty_diagnosis.rs pins the contract. Existing .unwrap_or(Dirty::Full) workarounds in client renderer and server synthesize_incremental implement strict over-emission, preserving ADR-0018 loss-tolerance. Dirty::Clean/Partial fast paths are dead code in any pipeline that calls mark_synced until upstream is fixed. Upstream issue to file as follow-up.

Shipped via PR #7; closes the phux-q0e epic state-sync loop. FRAME_ACK { terminal_id, seq } added on wire 0x21; TerminalActor::on_frame_ack walks per-consumer dirty cache eviction via SnapshotSynthesizer::mark_synced.

Core state-sync stack shipped: q0e.1 (incremental synthesizer #4), q0e.2 (per-consumer RenderState lifecycle #3), q0e.3 (tick scheduler #6), q0e.4 (FRAME_ACK handler closing the loop #7). Plus phux-l0t (libghostty FFI bug diagnosis #5) and phux-6jb (tracking ticket for upstream fix revisit). Only q0e.5 (RTT-adaptive tick) remains, deferred per its description. ADR-0018 fully implemented end-to-end.

Already landed in commits 21edfd2 (feat(protocol,client,server): VIEWPORT_RESIZE wire frame + client SIGWINCH) and 6636f5a (feat(server): AttachTarget::Last + 4hp/byc.5 resize connector). All deliverables present on main: FrameKind::ViewportResize variant with TYPE_VIEWPORT_RESIZE=0x20, encode/decode in wire/frame.rs + wire/decode.rs, client SIGWINCH branch in attach/driver.rs emits viewport_resize_frame() upstream, server handle_viewport_resize in runtime.rs fans resize to TerminalActor's resize mailbox, snapshot tests (snap_viewport_resize_cells_only, snap_viewport_resize_with_pixels) in frame_wire_snapshots.rs, proptest roundtrip_viewport_resize in wire_roundtrip.rs. just ci green (375/375 tests). The w1-4hp-viewport-resize worktree branch has zero commits ahead of main; ticket was stale.

Implemented in b81d62c. CSI/SS3 arrows, F1-F20, modifier-prefixed sequences, SGR mouse (DEC 1006), focus reports (DEC 1004), bracketed paste (DEC 2004). libghostty exposes no input-byte decoder (only encoders for the reverse direction); hand-rolled in attach/input.rs. Follow-ups filed: phux-0wx (X10 mouse), phux-jes (urxvt-1015), phux-1kf (kitty CSI u).
completed

Landed in commit 0ac50bf via PR #11. TerminalId is now a tagged union (Local/Satellite) with 1-byte wire tag prefix. PROTOCOL_VERSION 0.1.0 → 0.2.0. SPEC.md updated with changelog row. 37 files / +585/-228. All snapshot tests rebaselined. just ci green on integrated main.

Landed in commit 1317310 via PR #9. StatusBarPainter wired into client render path. Default Position::Bottom per DESIGN.md §8.1; Position::Top reserved for a future config switch (added but not exposed). time + session-name widgets render from config. Status row painted AFTER each pane render, tmux-style. 963 inserts; integration test asserts widget output. Follow-ups noted in the agent's report: per-widget min poll interval, session-name carrier on the wire, per-cell SGR plumbing in WidgetCell.
Landed in commit 5f4fbc0 via PR #12. X10 legacy mouse (CSI M Cb Cx Cy) — new 3-byte consumer state in input.rs. 5 unit tests (click/release/shift). Shipped together with phux-jes.
Landed in commit 5f4fbc0 via PR #12. urxvt-1015 decimal mouse (CSI <btn>;<col>;<row>M, no leading <). 4 unit tests (click/release/wheel). Shipped together with phux-0wx.

Landed in commit 2bf3634 via PR #14. Kitty CSI u parser targeting KIP level 1 (disambiguate) + level 2 (event types). 12 unit tests. Levels 3-5 (alternates, base layout, text codepoints) absorbed-and-dropped; follow-ups filed: phux-9z0 (repeat events), phux-y5p (KIP 3-5), phux-6ri (hyper/meta mods missing in libghostty Mods).

Landed in commit db106e6 via PR #15. Per-cell match reconcile (option b: read_grapheme_at via RenderState snapshot, avoids second !Send Terminal) eliminates v0 drain-on-every-frame flicker. Predict Enter at EOL. 12 new unit tests. Deferred: phux-9gw.1.3 (cursor-motion arrows), phux-9gw.1.4 (UTF-8 codepoints), phux-9gw.1.5 (full-line backspace from prompt column).

Landed in commit 557a7f6 via PR #13. New [experimental] section in phux-config schema; predictive-echo: bool default false. CLI dispatches to run_with_predict when set. DESIGN.md §4.2 documents the flag and the 'experimental knobs may rename without SemVer bump' caveat. 3 config parser tests.
Naked `phux` invocation shipped via PR. Follow-ups filed: phux-k61.2 (phux ls), phux-k61.3 (server CreateIfMissing), phux-k61.4 (most-recently-focused tracking).

Landed in PR (this branch). CursorLeft/CursorRight predictions over a known cell, with width-aware advance/retreat. Reconcile classifier added (confirmed/pending/contradicted). Overlay paints no cell. Tests: arrow_left_over_known_cell, arrow_right_over_wide_grapheme, arrow_left_at_col_zero, arrow_right_at_right_edge, per_cell_cursor_left_*, per_cell_cursor_right_*.

Landed in PR (this branch). predict_key now accepts any single Unicode scalar value; uses unicode-width crate (added with PR-body justification). Width 1 → 1-col advance; width 2 (CJK / wide emoji) → 2-col advance with right-edge guard. Width 0 (combining marks) and multi-codepoint graphemes (ZWJ) still deferred — filed as follow-up.
Landed in commit fixing private intra-doc links in predict/mod.rs and predict/state.rs. cargo doc -D warnings now green on main.
Landed in commit 0150b9d via PR #17. event_type=2 maps to KeyAction::Repeat (libghostty variant verified at rev 31d1f70).
Landed in commit 0150b9d via PR #17. KIP level 5 text payload populates KeyEvent.text when group-1 sub-params ≥ 2 present. Level 3 alternates/base-layout dropped with tracing.
Landed in commit 0150b9d via PR #17. Hyper→SUPER, meta→ALT (refined option c). Preserves user intent over silent drop. Distinct bits when libghostty grows them is deferred.

Landed in commit 9a78a96 via PR #20. ErrorCode enum + ERROR FrameKind variant + encode/decode were already on main; PR added snapshot fixture corpus (snap_error_session_not_found, snap_error_with_request_id_invalid_command, snap_error_internal_max_code) verifying wire bytes match SPEC §14.

Landed in commit 641229e via PR #23. ColorSupport enum (TrueColor/Indexed256/Indexed16/Mono) wired through HELLO/ClientCapabilities. detect_color_support heuristic uses COLORTERM/TERM/TERM_PROGRAM. Hello body grew one byte (additive, decode tolerant).

Landed in commit e8b92e8 via PR #19 (with the underlying grid.rs fix already on main in 5c0cb82). PR added CJK+emoji round-trip test (synthesizer_round_trips_cjk_and_emoji) hardening regression coverage via CellIteration::raw_cell()?.wide() = CellWide::SpacerTail.

Landed in commit 30c7a5e via PR #21. MouseProtocol + MouseEncoding re-export libghostty TrackingMode + Format. Internal state per SPEC §8.5 — not on the wire; PerTerminalMouseEncoder uses them via set_options_from_terminal.
Landed in commit f3f6b40 via PR #16. justfile 'doc' recipe + ci target chain now includes cargo doc with RUSTDOCFLAGS='-D warnings'. Aligns local just ci with CI's doc gate. Verified by break test.

Landed in d74beda. Allocated discriminants 0x50-0x54 (C->S), 0xD0 (METADATA_CHANGED). Scope tags 0x00/0x01/0x02. CollectionId(u32) newtype with DEFAULT_COLLECTION_ID=1 as v0.1 placeholder. HELLO grew trailing layers byte (additive per SPEC §6). METADATA_CHANGED carries value inline (departure from original SPEC §7.4 sketch). GET/LIST wire reply paths deferred — see follow-up ticket.

Landed in aeac910. phux_client::layout module with re-exports of wire::info::{LayoutNode, SplitDir}, free functions split_at/kill_pane/focus_direction/pane_rects/leaves, LayoutState + ciborium v1 envelope. Two ergonomic deviations from phux-core::window: kill_pane returns Ok(None) for empty-tree (not Err(LastPane)); split_at takes new_pane: &TerminalId (clippy).

Landed in 983c18d. attach::multi_pane module with compute_layout/paint_dividers; PaneSlot{terminal, renderer} held in main_loop's panes HashMap keyed by TerminalId; layout_state field; render_at extension on TerminalRenderer for sub-Rect rendering. SIGWINCH not wired (deferred to follow-up); single-pane fast path preserved.

Landed in 5fe148e. Pure attach::reflow module with compute_reflow(LayoutState, prev_rects, new_dims) -> ReflowDiff{new_rects, changed, too_small}. Driver wire-up deferred per narrowed scope — see follow-up ticket.

Landed in 54aad83. Dedicated METADATA_VALUE (0xD1) + METADATA_KEYS (0xD2) S->C reply frames keyed by request_id (echoes the GET/LIST request). Rationale: COMMAND_RESULT would force premature design closure on L1/L2 payloads; L3 family already opinionated on inline values per 4li.2. Server reply path L3-gated. SPEC §7.4 updated.
All four children landed (vp0.1 wave A, vp0.2 wave C SPEC tiering, vp0.3 ADR touch-ups, vp0.4 TerminalId tagged-union). Epic complete.

Already complete per SPEC.md Appendix C draft.4 changelog (2026-05-26). Verified in main: §2 Frame term re-anchored on per-Terminal seq (line 95); §6.2 RenderingMode deprecated in prose (line 318-322); §11.1 ADR ref points at ADR-0013 (line 1421-1423); §12 flow control uses TERMINAL_OUTPUT + per-Terminal seq (line 1427+); Appendix B explicitly drops DiffOp guidance (line 1898-1900). Ticket was filed but cleanup landed in the same wave that prompted it. No-op close.

Landed in 78d224d. New attach::actions module with pure-function dispatch (apply_split/apply_kill/apply_focus/apply_resize/apply_next_pane/apply_previous_pane). Driver wires HELLO L3 layer + GetMetadata/SubscribeMetadata on attach + MetadataValue/MetadataChanged reconcile + dispatcher. Resolver action surface is string-based BTreeMap<String,toml::Value> (not enum). Five user-visible action names recognized. KNOWN GAP: split-pane and kill-pane warn+bell because SPAWN/TerminalClosed wire frames do not exist yet — see follow-up ticket. 19 unit tests on actions.rs all green.

Landed in e9242fe. Server resolve_create_if_missing reuses seed_session_with_actor/seed_session_with_pty helpers; root_token threaded through accept_loop -> handle_client -> handle_attach -> resolve_attach_target. Three wire integration tests in attach_create_if_missing.rs. Wire schema: CreateIfMissing {name: String, command: Option<Vec<String>>, cwd: Option<String>} — name is required; client (naked phux) uses DEFAULT_SESSION_NAME = 'default'.

Landed in next commit. SIGWINCH arm of attach driver now branches on layout_state.tree.is_some(): multi-pane path computes prev_rects via multi_pane::compute_layout(prev_dims), runs reflow::compute_reflow for too_small detection, then calls existing repaint_multi_pane helper (which clears screen + libghostty resize per pane + paints dividers + status bar). Single-pane fallback preserved. Wire-side per-Terminal RESIZE emission gated on phux-4li.10 (expanded to include TERMINAL_RESIZE alongside SPAWN/TERMINAL_CLOSED frame work).

Landed in be740c7. Input routing now reads layout_state.focus.as_ref() (canonical) for INPUT_KEY/PASTE/FOCUS forwarding; drops with debug log if focus is None (no panic). New pure seam: attach::multi_pane::route_mouse_event(layout, viewport, mouse) -> RouteDecision{Pane{target, pane_x, pane_y, focus_changed} | DividerNoOp | NoFocus}. Click-to-focus updates layout_state.focus + clears predict overlay. Divider clicks no-op (drag-to-resize deferred). 6 unit tests on the pure seam.

Wire layer landed in 33eb147. Allocated 0x22 SPAWN_TERMINAL + 0x23 TERMINAL_RESIZE (C->S) and 0xA1 TERMINAL_CLOSED + 0xA2 TERMINAL_SPAWNED (S->C). SpawnError #[non_exhaustive] enum with CollectionNotFound/SpawnFailed(String); SpawnResult tagged Ok=0x00/Err=0x01 documented as the Result<T,E> wire convention in SPEC §7.2.1. 8 insta snapshots + 4 proptest round-trips + 6 hand-rolled edge cases. No phux-server / phux-client touches needed (existing FrameKind matches have catch-all arms). Server + client wire-up filed as 4li.10.1 + 4li.10.2.
